name: espanol-diccionario
description: An Obsidian plugin for learning Spain (Castilian) Spanish with offline dictionary, audio pronunciation, and AI chat

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json package-lock.json manifest.json versions.json
scripts.postversion: git tag -d v$npm_package_version 2>/dev/null || true && git tag $npm_package_version HEAD
